response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial AI infrastructure with compliance and real-time credit risk systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time data apps
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated experience leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ in a scale-up fintech context
Lacks explicit evidence of building or operating AI systems in regulated financial environments
No mention of working with financial data, credit risk models, or compliance infrastructure
